raw_responses.title: KVComm Selective KV Sharing ICLR 2026 (2510.03346)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: layer-wise selection strategy based on attention importance Gaussian prior; transmits as few as 30% of layers' KV pairs.

raw_responses.title: KVTuner Sensitivity-Aware Layer-Wise Mixed-Precision KV ICML 2025
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: adaptive layer-wise KV quantization precision; 3.25-bit mixed-precision near-lossless Llama-3.1-8B.

raw_responses.title: Entropy-Guided KV Caching Efficient LLM Inference
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: per-head entropy → layer importance → KV cache budget allocation.

raw_responses.title: SqueezeAttention 2D Layer-Wise KV-Cache Budget
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: 2D management of KV-cache sequence-wise + layer-wise budget allocation.

raw_responses.title: KVQuant 10M Context KV Quantization NeurIPS 2024
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: KV-cache bit-encoded quantization (2-bit + 4-bit) preserving accuracy via pre-RoPE quantization.

raw_responses.title: RetrievalAttention Long-Context Vector Retrieval OpenReview
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: training-free approximate NN search for KV vectors retrieved during generation.
